violations.claim: Temporal: shipOrder called twice on the same Order object.
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P4
; LINE: 36
; Temporal: shipOrder called twice on the same Order object.
; First call succeeds. Second call: state_before = shipped (3),
; VALID_TRANSITIONS["shipped"] = [] — but no guard blocks re-execution.
; trackingNumber is silently overwritten.

(declare-const state_after_first Int)
(declare-const state_after_second Int)
(declare-const tracking_v1 Int)       ; tracking set by first call
(declare-const tracking_v2 Int)       ; tracking set by second call

; Code transition (first call): state := shipped (3)
(assert (= state_after_first 3))
(assert (= tracking_v1 1))            ; first tracking value

; Code transition (second call): no guard on current state
; state_before for second call = state_after_first = 3
(assert (= state_after_second 3))
; Code transition: trackingNumber is overwritten unconditionally
(assert (= tracking_v2 2))
(assert (not (= tracking_v1 tracking_v2)))

; Violation: second call fires on shipped order (invalid per VALID_TRANSITIONS["shipped"]=[])
; and silently replaces the tracking number
(assert (= state_after_first 3))      ; pre-state for second call is "shipped"

(check-sat)

(check-sat)
